name: oidc-step-up
summary: OAuth 2.0 Step-Up Authentication Challenge — AS-side claims (RFC 9470)
description: Adds the `acr` and `auth_time` claims to JWT-formatted access tokens so a Resource Server can implement RFC 9470 step-up challenges. The AS-side mapping `authenticationLevel → acr` mirrors what LemonLDAP::NG core already does for ID tokens (uses `oidcServiceMetaDataAuthnContext` when set, falls back to `loa-<level>`). Pure plugin, no core change required. Companion RS-side enforcement (emitting the `WWW-Authenticate: Bearer error=insufficient_user_authentication` challenge) is out of scope and lives in handler-side code.
author: LemonLDAP::NG team <lemonldap-ng@ow2.org>
